body: {"decision":"warn","decision_source":"pre_claim_intake","detail":"target file `.claude-plugin/plugin.json` not found in working directory: The target artifacts referenced in the scope (`.claude-plugin/plugin.json` and `skills/helix/SKILL.md`) are not present in the working directory.
